texto: When faced with 2 choices, simply toss a coin. It works not because it settles the question for you. But because in that brief moment when the coin is in the air YOU SUDDENLY KNOW WHAT YOUR HOPING FOR. :)
explicacao: Citação de wisdom quotes sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “When faced with 2 choices, simply toss a coin. It works not because it settles the question for y…” articula reflexao, advice, because em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e reflexao.
